commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates zh-CN Control UI locale strings for the theme, cron, and Dreaming restart-confirmation labels and adds a focused Vitest content guard.

PR surface: Source -1, Tests +38. Total +37 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has the exact reported zh-CN values in source and the UI callers render those keys directly; the patch defect is also reproduced by the CI check-test-types failure on the added test.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the added test's TypeScript narrowing without changing the locale choices or product behavior.

target.title: fix(i18n): correct zh-CN theme/cron labels and translate Dreaming restart modal [AI-assisted]
target.body:
Fixes #78038

Allow edits by maintainers: yes

This PR was prepared with AI assistance (AI-assisted): an AI agent located the
mistranslations, cross-checked each against `ui/src/i18n/locales/en.ts`, applied
the locale edits, regenerated the bundle with `ui:i18n:sync`, and ran the
commands shown below. A human is submitting and is responsible for the content.

## Summary

Issue #78038 reports three Simplified-Chinese (`zh-CN`) translation defects in
the Control UI. All three reproduce exactly at the current `main` HEAD:

1. **Dreaming restart modal left in English.** The six
   `dreaming.restartConfirmation.*` strings (`title`, `subtitle`, `warning`,
   `confirm`, `restarting`, `failed`) were never translated and rendered as raw
   English to zh-CN users.
2. **`common.light` wrong sense.** The theme-mode label "Light" (paired with
   `common.dark`/`common.system`) was `浅睡` ("light *sleep*", copied from the
   Dreaming sleep-phase label) instead of `浅色` ("light *color*").
3. **`cron` Name labels wrong sense.** `cron.jobs.name` and `cron.form.fieldName`
   (a job/task *label*, English "Name") were `姓名` (a *person's full name*)
   instead of `名称` (a name/label of a thing).

The fix edits only the eight affected string values in
`ui/src/i18n/locales/zh-CN.ts`, using the brand term **"Gateway"** (not 网关)
consistently across the restart-modal strings. Look-alike keys that are already
correct are deliberately left untouched: `dreaming.phase.light` (`浅睡`, the
sleep phase) and `profile.name` (`姓名`, a real person-name field).

A content test was added under `ui/src/i18n/test/` that imports the real
`zh-CN` and `en` locale modules and asserts all nine keys, including guards that
`common.light` no longer equals either the English source or the Dreaming-phase
look-alike, and that every restart-modal string differs from English and
contains Han characters.

## Before (RED) — new test fails on the unedited locale

Written test-first against the unmodified `zh-CN.ts`:

```text
$ node ../node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/i18n/test/zh-CN-labels.test.ts
 RUN  v4.1.8 /private/tmp/oc-r3-wt-78038/ui

 ❯ src/i18n/test/zh-CN-labels.test.ts (3 tests | 3 failed) 4ms
   × common.light is the theme color 浅色, not 浅睡 (light sleep)
     AssertionError: expected '浅睡' to be '浅色'
   × cron job/field Name labels are 名称, not the person-name 姓名
     AssertionError: expected '姓名' to be '名称'
   × all Dreaming restartConfirmation strings are translated (not left in English)
     AssertionError: restartConfirmation.title still equals English:
       expected 'Restart Gateway to Apply Change' not to be 'Restart Gateway to Apply Change'

 Test Files  1 failed (1)
      Tests  3 failed (3)
```

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior or issue addressed:** Three zh-CN Control-UI mistranslations from issue #78038 — the six untranslated `dreaming.restartConfirmation.*` strings, `common.light` (theme "Light") wrongly shown as 浅睡 ("light sleep"), and the cron `name`/`fieldName` labels wrongly shown as the person-name 姓名 instead of 名称. After this patch the zh-CN locale shows 浅色, 名称, and fully-translated restart-modal strings, while the correct look-alikes `dreaming.phase.light` (浅睡) and `profile.name` (姓名) stay unchanged.

**Real environment tested:** Local clone of openclaw/openclaw at main HEAD `45d7167e` (worktree on branch `r3/fix-78038`, same HEAD). Node v24.7.0, pnpm 11.2.2, macOS 26.4.1 (arm64). Dependencies installed via pnpm; vitest v4.1.8.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran the generated-file contract check `node --import tsx scripts/control-ui-i18n.ts check --locale zh-CN` (the same check CI runs as `ui:i18n:check`), then ran the content vitest `node ../node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/i18n/test/zh-CN-labels.test.ts` from the `ui/` directory.

**Evidence after fix:** Live terminal output copied verbatim after applying the edits and regenerating with `ui:i18n:sync`:

```text
$ node --import tsx scripts/control-ui-i18n.ts check --locale zh-CN
control-ui-i18n: raw-copy: baseline entries=742
control-ui-i18n: command=check locales=1 provider=fallback-only model=n/a thinking=n/a timeout=2m 0s batch_chars=2000
control-ui-i18n: [1/1] zh-CN: no provider configured, using English fallback for pending keys
control-ui-i18n: [1/1] zh-CN: done changed=false fallbacks=0 elapsed=119ms
zh-CN: clean (fallbacks=0)
$ echo "EXIT=$?"
EXIT=0

$ node ../node_modules/.bin/vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/i18n/test/zh-CN-labels.test.ts
 RUN  v4.1.8 /private/tmp/oc-r3-wt-78038/ui

 ✓ src/i18n/test/zh-CN-labels.test.ts (3 tests) 2ms
   ✓ common.light is the theme color 浅色, not 浅睡 (light sleep)
   ✓ cron job/field Name labels are 名称, not the person-name 姓名
   ✓ all Dreaming restartConfirmation strings are translated (not left in English)

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  3 passed (3)
```

The on-disk values after the fix: `common.light` = 浅色, `cron.jobs.name` = 名称, `cron.form.fieldName` = 名称, `dreaming.restartConfirmation.title` = 重启 Gateway 以应用更改 (and the five sibling strings likewise rendered in Simplified Chinese).

**Observed result after fix:** The `control-ui-i18n` contract check reports `zh-CN: clean (fallbacks=0)` and exits 0, proving the generated-bundle contract is intact and `ui:i18n:sync` re-emits the corrected on-disk values (no drift, no provider needed). The content test flipped from 3 failing to 3 passing, confirming the eight string values now carry the intended Simplified-Chinese meanings and the look-alike keys are untouched.

**What was not tested:** I did not render the zh-CN Control UI in a real browser to visually confirm the modal layout, and I did not have an independent native zh-CN speaker review the wording beyond cross-referencing the issue author's proposed table and the en source-of-truth. The cron-label and theme-label word choices (名称, 浅色) follow standard zh UI conventions but were not validated against a style guide. No end-to-end gateway restart was triggered (only the i18n string layer was changed).
target.author: eldar702

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
